name: Bonterra Resources Inc.
description: Bonterra Resources Inc. is a junior gold explorer with an advanced portfolio of gold deposits in Quebec's Urban-Barry region, including the Gladiator, Barry, Moroy, and Bachelor deposits totaling 1.63 million ounces of Measured and Indicated resources. The company operates a central milling facility and has an earn-in and joint venture agreement with Osisko Mining (now Gold Fields) for the Urban-Barry properties.
